products.name: Donald Trump Stencil
products.shortDesc: Halftone spray-paint stencil. Two sizes, card stock or plastic.
products.description:
Halftone dot stencil of Donald Trump — perfect for street art, spray paint projects, or bold statement pieces.

Cut from heavy card stock or durable plastic for clean lines and multiple uses. Comes with instructions.

products.name: Art Print — 8×10"
products.shortDesc: Giclée-quality print on 100lb matte paper. Ships rolled in a tube.
products.description:
High-quality giclée print on heavyweight 100lb matte paper. Rich, vibrant colours that last.

Available in any design from the collection — stencils, illustrations, Monopoly cards, and more. Message us after ordering with your pick.

Ships carefully rolled in a protective tube. Arrives ready to frame.

products.name: Montana BLACK — Shock Black
products.shortDesc: Montana BLACK 400ml. High-pressure, ultra-opaque matte finish.
products.description:
Montana BLACK Shock Black — the go-to for stencil work. Ultra-opaque, high-pressure formula with a dead-matte finish. Fast-drying with minimal bleed.

Made in Germany. 400ml can. Works on virtually any surface.

products.name: Montana BLACK — Pure White
products.shortDesc: Montana BLACK 400ml. High-coverage white. Great on dark surfaces.
products.description:
Montana BLACK Pure White — high coverage on dark surfaces, ideal for layering and background work. Ultra-opaque, fast-drying, matte finish.

Made in Germany. 400ml can.

products.name: Montana BLACK — Signal Red
products.shortDesc: Montana BLACK 400ml. Bold, vibrant red. Ultra-opaque matte.
products.description:
Montana BLACK Signal Red — bold, high-pressure, ultra-opaque. Cuts through any background with a clean matte finish.

Made in Germany. 400ml can.

products.name: Montana BLACK — 3 Can Bundle
products.shortDesc: Shock Black, Pure White, Signal Red. Everything you need.
products.description:
Montana BLACK Shock Black, Pure White, and Signal Red — the three colours you need to get started with stencil work.

High-pressure, ultra-opaque, dead-matte finish. Made in Germany. Three 400ml cans.
